about_me.title: About me
about_me.description: I absolutely love programming! It's a playground for building something new and figuring out how things work. I started teaching myself code in high school, kept going through university while getting my math degree, then went back to study computer science. Now it's not just a hobby - it's my job too.

sibill.description: Full-stack developer for B2B platform. I develop both back-end and front-end, collaborate with product managers and designers. I prefer agile methodologies, close-knit teams and frequent communication.

argo.description: Computer Vision expert: designing, prototyping and implementing advanced algorithms. I led development of an internal C++ library, with performance optimization for ARM devices, smartphones and x86.

computer_science.title: Computer science
computer_science.description: I really enjoy learning about and staying current with new technologies. I often attend meetups like JVM User Group, XP User Group, Rust Milano and Opensource Saturday.

bike.title: Bike
bike.description: My bicycle is my go-to mode of transportation for urban travel and excursions. The exercise and connection to the environment it provides brings me joy.

food.title: Food
food.description: I believe that eating is one of life's greatest pleasures. Cooking allows me to combine ingredients in creative ways.
